description_long: This is a modern, tactical sniper rifle with a striking blue and black color scheme, featuring a skeletonized stock for reduced weight and improved ergonomics. The rifle has a long, heavy barrel designed for precision shooting, and a prominent scope mounted on top for long-range targeting. The body is constructed with angular, geometric lines and includes a pistol grip and an adjustable cheek rest. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger guard. The fore-end is robust, likely to provide stability when shooting from a rest or bipod. The muzzle appears to have a small device, possibly a thread protector or compensator, at the tip of the barrel.
description: A blue and black tactical sniper rifle with a skeletonized stock, long heavy barrel, mounted scope, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, skeletonized stock, scope, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end, muzzle device, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with more detail on the magazine and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock's structure, cheek rest, and alignment of the scope.
